title: O How I Love Your Holy Law

verses.text: I have more wisdom than my teachers, Lord, for on your laws I meditate each day. I have more insight than the aged ones, For all your testimonies I obey.
I keep my feet from ev’ry evil path, For I desire to follow all your word; Since you have taught me all your wise decrees, From them I do not turn aside, O LORD.
How sweet your words are, Lord, unto my taste – Sweeter than honey is upon my tongue Through your commandments I will understand, Therefore, O LORD, I hate each path that’s wrong
